title: Distributed Rate Limiting & Quotas
description: Architect distributed rate limiting and quota systems for APIs. Implement 'Token Bucket' algorithms using Redis to control request rates. Mitigate automated credential stuffing, scraping, and L7 DoS attacks.
objectives: Architect distributed rate limiting and quota systems for APIs.
Implement 'Token Bucket' algorithms using Redis to control request rates.
Mitigate automated credential stuffing, scraping, and L7 DoS attacks.
